texto: He seems to be supporting her tenderly. But what holds them together is difficult to pin down.In her memoir, she wrote that he once dropped her on her hip very painfully, and she had the distinct impression he’d done it on purpose.What really goes on between two people is very difficult to say.

frase_original: He seems to be supporting her tenderly. But what holds them together is difficult to pin down.In her memoir, she wrote that he once dropped her on her hip very painfully, and she had the distinct impression he’d done it on purpose.What really goes on between two people is very difficult to say.

texto: Partner struck me as an ugly euphemism. Euphemism in the sense that people don’t like to talk about sex, so they displace it on to some kind of business model. Since I have a distaste for business, I see no appeal to something that sounds like a financial leadership team.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Barbara Browning: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a lideranca. O trecho “Partner struck me as an ugly euphemism. Euphemism in the sense that people don’t like to talk abo…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que lideranca, lover, partner pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de partner e queer.

frase_original: Partner struck me as an ugly euphemism. Euphemism in the sense that people don’t like to talk about sex, so they displace it on to some kind of business model. Since I have a distaste for business, I see no appeal to something that sounds like a financial leadership team.
